rationale: 8 hits found (threshold >=1 fails). Productive Initial Chaos (forced-disagreement MAD) is an exact functional twin of forced-canon-dissonance. Heterogeneous MAD (Springer 2025) twins the voice-independence/diagnostic-value claim. TRACED twins canon-stability tracking via Progress+Stability decomposition. Cognitive Dissonance Revealed Belief (already named in candidate differentiation) covers dissonance+factual-consistency probe. The 2nd-interval cosine 0.80-0.90 constraint is a thin parameterisation of existing paraphrase-pair eval (RobustFlow). Recombination is non-novel.
